channel.title: Octaanalysis on CEDIS
channel.description: Recent content in Octaanalysis on CEDIS

item.title: OctaAnalysis
item.description: CEDIS platform created to support the design, management, and analysis of gamified educational and collaborative experiences.

item.title: OctaAnalysis platform expands CEDIS's portfolio of digital innovation
item.description: OctaAnalysis, a platform developed by CEDIS, supports the analysis, management, and continuous improvement of gamified learning and collaboration experiences.
